description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring a combination of white and dark brown exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered carport with two parked vehicles, a paved driveway, and a small landscaped area with two trees. Large rectangular windows are arranged asymmetrically across the building, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio or deck area, ideal for outdoor activities. The roof includes a green section, possibly a rooftop garden or terrace, adding a touch of eco-friendly design. The house is set adjacent to a wide street, with the main entrance accessible from the driveway.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with white and dark brown walls, large windows, a carport, and a rooftop garden. The design features a spacious patio and landscaped front with trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport with two vehicles, main entrance, driveway, and landscaped area with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white exterior, large windows, and the green rooftop area; the driveway and street are visible to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive patio or deck, large windows, and the green rooftop; the carport is partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dark brown section of the house, the green rooftop, and the driveway extending to the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is recessed under a carport, with a simple door, no steps, and minimal decorative elements; flanked by landscaping and trees.
